banner.defended: Hexhaven is defended! {{name}} is the new Defender of Hexhaven (+1 VP).
banner.defendedTie: Hexhaven is defended (tied strongest defenders — each draws a progress card).
banner.pillaged: The barbarians win! {{names}} lost a city to pillage.
banner.pillagedNone: The barbarians win, but no city could be pillaged.

reason.noCityOwned: You need at least one city.
reason.robberLocked: The robber is locked until the first barbarian attack.
reason.noKnightSpot: No connected spot for a knight right now.
reason.noInactiveKnight: You have no inactive knight to activate.
reason.noPromotableKnight: No knight can be promoted right now (next level full, or Fortress needed for strong → mighty).
reason.noMovableKnight: No active knight can move right now.
reason.noDisplaceableKnight: No active knight can displace a weaker opponent right now.
reason.noKnightNextToRobber: Need an active knight next to the robber.
reason.noEligibleCity: No eligible city for a wall (needs an unwalled city, under the cap).

improvements.title: City improvements

ability.trade: Level 3 — Trading House: trade a commodity 2:1 with the bank.
ability.politics: Level 3 — Fortress: your knights may be promoted strong → mighty.
ability.science: Level 3 — Aqueduct: a roll that gives you nothing grants 1 free resource.

improvements.metropolisHint: L4 claims that track's Metropolis (city +2 VP); L5 can recapture it.

knightControls.title: Knights & city walls
knightControls.pickSourceHint: Click one of your highlighted knights, then its target.

progressHand.title: Progress cards
progressHand.beforeRollOnly: Alchemist must be played before you roll.
progressHand.dialogPending: Choose the card's target to play it.
progressHand.notWiredYet: Playing this card isn't wired up in the client yet.

resourceMonopoly.title: Resource Monopoly
resourceMonopoly.instructions: Every other player gives you 2 of the resource you choose.

commodityMonopoly.title: Commodity Monopoly
commodityMonopoly.instructions: Every other player gives you 1 of the commodity you choose.

crane.title: Crane
crane.instructions: Build a city improvement for 1 fewer commodity. Choose the track.

alchemist.title: Alchemist
alchemist.instructions: Choose the yellow and red number-die values for this turn's roll.

engineer.title: Engineer
engineer.instructions: Build a free city wall under one of your cities.

inventor.title: Inventor
inventor.instructions: Swap the number tokens on two hexes (6 and 8 can't be moved).

medicine.title: Medicine
medicine.instructions: Upgrade one of your settlements to a city for 2 ore + 1 grain.

merchant.title: Merchant
merchant.instructions: Place the merchant on a hex next to your settlement or city.

merchantFleet.title: Merchant Fleet
merchantFleet.instructions: Make one 2:1 bank trade this turn. Pick what you give and what you receive.

commercialHarbor.title: Commercial Harbor
commercialHarbor.instructions: Take one resource of your choice from each opponent, giving each a commodity of your choice in return.

masterMerchant.title: Master Merchant
masterMerchant.instructions: Take 2 cards of your choice from a player who has more victory points than you.

bishop.title: Bishop
bishop.instructions: Move the robber; steal 1 card from every player next to its new hex.

deserter.title: Deserter
deserter.instructions: An opponent removes one knight; you place a new knight of the same level for free.

diplomat.title: Diplomat
diplomat.instructions: Remove an open road. If it's yours, you rebuild it for free.

intrigue.title: Intrigue
intrigue.instructions: Displace an opponent's knight sitting on your road, ignoring the strength rule.

spy.title: Spy
spy.instructions: Pick an opponent, then take one of their progress cards.

alchemist.name: Alchemist
alchemist.desc: Before rolling, choose the yellow & red die values yourself.

crane.name: Crane
crane.desc: Build a city improvement for 1 fewer commodity.

engineer.name: Engineer
engineer.desc: Build a city wall for free.

inventor.name: Inventor
inventor.desc: Swap the number tokens on two hexes (not 6 or 8).

irrigation.name: Irrigation
irrigation.desc: Gain 2 grain per fields hex you border.

medicine.name: Medicine
medicine.desc: Upgrade a settlement to a city for 2 ore + 1 grain.

mining.name: Mining
mining.desc: Gain 2 ore per mountains hex you border.

smith.name: Smith
smith.desc: Promote up to 2 knights one level each, for free.

merchant.name: Merchant
merchant.desc: Place the merchant on a hex next to your settlement/city: 2:1 trade there, +1 VP while you hold it.

merchantFleet.name: Merchant Fleet
merchantFleet.desc: Trade one chosen resource/commodity 2:1 with the bank, once.

commercialHarbor.name: Commercial Harbor
commercialHarbor.desc: Each other player gives you a resource of your choice for a commodity of theirs.

masterMerchant.name: Master Merchant
masterMerchant.desc: Take 2 cards of your choice from a player with more VP than you.

resourceMonopoly.name: Resource Monopoly
resourceMonopoly.desc: Every other player gives you 2 of a named resource.

commodityMonopoly.name: Commodity Monopoly
commodityMonopoly.desc: Every other player gives you 1 of a named commodity.

bishop.name: Bishop
bishop.desc: Move the robber and steal 1 card from every player adjacent to it.

deserter.name: Deserter
deserter.desc: An opponent removes a knight; you place a new one of the same level for free.

diplomat.name: Diplomat
diplomat.desc: Remove an open road; rebuild it free if it was yours.

intrigue.name: Intrigue
intrigue.desc: Displace an opponent's knight on your road, ignoring the strength rule.

saboteur.name: Saboteur
saboteur.desc: Every player with at least your VP discards half their hand.

spy.name: Spy
spy.desc: Look at another player's progress-card hand and take 1.

warlord.name: Warlord
warlord.desc: Activate all your knights for free.

wedding.name: Wedding
wedding.desc: Every player with more VP than you gives you 2 resources/commodities of your choice.
